hook: Direct endings are kinder than vague hope when interest is gone.
body: Honest closure respects both people more than soft confusion disguised as politeness.

hook: Many people think disappearing is gentler than naming a lack of interest, but it often creates more distress.
body: Compassion in dating usually looks like honesty with proportion, not avoidance with nice intentions.

hook: Compassion in dating usually looks like honesty with proportion, not avoidance with nice intentions.
body: A simple message saying you do not feel the fit is cleaner than letting someone keep wondering.

hook: A simple message saying you do not feel the fit is cleaner than letting someone keep wondering.
body: When you know you are out, close the door clearly enough that the other person can walk away cleanly.
